pom.xml.general_idea: Replace separate source and target configuration with the unified release flag for Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in favor of 'release' for modern Java toolchains; using 'release' ensures consistent compilation and runtime behavior for Java 21.

src/main/java/h2/orm/service/BackupServi.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for Java 21 compatibility.
src/main/java/h2/orm/service/BackupServi.why_exists: Paths.get() is deprecated for removal in Java 21; using it may cause compile-time deprecation warnings or errors depending on compiler settings, and Path.of() is the preferred modern API.
